privileged_info_summary: The task adds Jetpack Navigation with Bottom Navigation to a synthetic Android project named 'NavigationApp' with package 'com.example.navapp' located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NavigationApp. The implementation requires two androidx.navigation dependencies: navigation-fragment-ktx and navigation-ui-ktx (version 2.7.7 or later; 2.7.7 released February 2024, current latest is 2.9.7 from January 2026). The metadata lists 5 required files (3 Fragment classes, 1 navigation graph XML, 1 menu XML) but critically omits 3 required fragment layout files (fragment_home.xml, fragment_dashboard.xml, fragment_settings.xml) that are explicitly mentioned in the task description, verified by the export script, and scored by the verifier. This is a significant metadata discrepancy: the verifier allocates 10 out of 100 points specifically for the 3 layout files not listed in expected_files.
